title: AbsorberFamily
description: Catalog entry describing wavelength band, absorptivity, temperature range, and evidence state of an absorber surface or receiver concept. Governed by model-extension-2-spec-v0.2.1 §7. Output-driving fields: wavelength_band_*, nominal_absorptivity, temperature_*. Metadata-only fields: contamination_sensitivity, corrosion_sensitivity, radiation_sensitivity, surface_state_class, notes[].

wavelength_band_min_um.description: Lower bound of absorber active wavelength band in micrometers. Output-driving per §7.4. Constraint: 0 < min <= nominal per §7.3.

wavelength_band_nominal_um.description: Nominal center wavelength in micrometers. Output-driving per §7.4.

wavelength_band_max_um.description: Upper bound of absorber active wavelength band in micrometers. Output-driving per §7.4. Constraint: nominal <= max per §7.3.

temperature_min_k.description: Minimum operating temperature in Kelvin. Output-driving per §7.4. Constraint: min < nominal < max per §7.3.

temperature_nominal_k.description: Nominal operating temperature in Kelvin. Output-driving per §7.4.

temperature_max_k.description: Maximum operating temperature in Kelvin. Output-driving per §7.4.

contamination_sensitivity.description: Qualitative contamination sensitivity class. Metadata-only per §7.4.

corrosion_sensitivity.description: Qualitative corrosion sensitivity class. Metadata-only per §7.4.

radiation_sensitivity.description: Qualitative radiation sensitivity class. Metadata-only per §7.4.

surface_state_class.description: Qualitative surface state descriptor. Metadata-only per §7.4.

output_effect_class.description: Declared output effect of this catalog entry per spec §12.4.

default_enabled_for_exploration.description: Whether this entry is pre-selected for exploratory comparison by default.

research_required.description: True if provenance_class is placeholder or hypothesis_only per spec §12.5.
